name: Single Card
description: A single card for quick daily guidance or a focused answer.

positions.name: The Card
positions.interpretation_prompt: This single card represents the essence of your question or the energy of the moment.

name: Three Card Spread
description: A versatile three-card spread. Most commonly read as Past / Present / Future, but can also represent Situation / Challenge / Advice.

positions.name: Past
positions.meaning: What has led to this moment — the foundation and recent history
positions.interpretation_prompt: This card represents the past influences shaping the current situation. What energy or events have led the querent here?

positions.name: Present
positions.meaning: The current situation — what is happening now
positions.interpretation_prompt: This card represents the present moment. What is the querent experiencing right now? What energy surrounds them?

positions.name: Future
positions.meaning: Where things are heading — the likely outcome if current energy continues
positions.interpretation_prompt: This card represents the future trajectory. What is likely to unfold? What should the querent be aware of?
